blended.narrative: Jay Peak is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,794 ft. Looking ahead, 28 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
